revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:阿禮神社]] {{Expand Japanese|阿禮神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Arei Shrine | native_name = 阿禮神社 | image = Arei-jinja, Haden.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Arei Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|36.105623|137.972931}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Arei Shrine'''|阿禮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181974 * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135419779|ltq=Q135419779|qid=Q135419779|1=Shikinai Supershrine}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11386164|ltq=Q11386164|qid=Q11386164|1=List of Shikinaisha in Shinano Province}} ** Series ordinal: 6 ** P155: {{ill|Isagoda Shrine|lt=Isagoda Shrine|ja|沙田神社|qid=Q11553081|1=Isagoda Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11597109|ltq=Q11597109|qid=Q11597109|1=Hotaka Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q111439036|ltq=Q111439036|qid=Q111439036|1=Shiojirimachi}} * Shinano|gl|Provincia de Shinano|hak|Shinano-koet|id|Provinsi Shinano|it|Shinano (provincia)|ja|信濃国|ko|시나노국|lt|Šinano žemė|ms|Wilayah Shinano|nl|Shinano (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Shinano|pt|Província de Shinano|ru|Синано (провинция)|simple|Shinano Province|sk|Šinano (provincia)|sr|Провинција Шинано|th|แคว้นชินาโนะ|tr|Shinano (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Сінано|zh_min_nan|Sinano-kok|zh_yue|信濃國|zh|信濃國|qid=Q289250|1=Shinano Province}} * {{ill|Q5097503|ltq=Q5097503|qid=Q5097503|1=Chikuma District, Shinano}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|36.105623|137.972931}}https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181974 == image (P18) == * Arei-jinja, Haden.jpg == OpenStreetMap node ID (P11693) == * 5044698122 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181974 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == location (P276) == * {{ill|Shiojiri-shuku|lt=Shiojiri-juku|en|Shiojiri-shuku|fr|Shiojiri-shuku|ja|塩尻宿|ko|시오지리슈쿠|qid=Q3482312|1=Shiojiri-shuku}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2100005006831 == Google Maps Customer ID (P3749) == * 6587365227707278172 == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Q135194114|ltq=Q135194114|qid=Q135194114|1=Arei Shrine okumiya}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '（前宮）長野県塩尻市塩尻町433-1', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '長野県塩尻市塩尻町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:阿禮神社]] {{wikidata link|Q62056170}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Arei Shrine |Image = [[File:Arei-jinja, Haden.jpg|250px]]
Haiden (worship hall) |Location = (Mae-gu) {{ill|lt=Nagano Prefecture|Q127877|qid=Q127877|1=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Shiojiri City|Q857272|qid=Q857272|1=Shiojiri, Nagano}}{{ill|lt=Shiojiri Town (Shiojiri City)|Q111439036|qid=Q111439036|lt=Shiojiri Town|1=Shiojirimachi}} 433-1 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}; {{ill|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}}; {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake no Ōkimi|1=Emperor Ōjin}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}; former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Prefectural Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} |Founded = |Honden = |Alternate names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = July 10–11 |Rituals = Iohata Festival (May 1)
Okusha Festival (June 29) |Map = {{Location map|Japan Nagano|label=Arei Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} {{Maplink2 |frame=yes |zoom=12 |frame-width=250 |type=point |marker=1 |type2=point |marker2=2 |coord2={{Coord |36.1045498 |137.9949858 }} |text=(1) Locations of the Mae-gu and (2) the Okusha }} '''Arei Shrine''' (Arei Jinja, also written 阿礼神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|lt=Shiojiri City|Q857272|qid=Q857272|1=Shiojiri, Nagano}}, {{ill|lt=Nagano Prefecture|Q127877|qid=Q127877|1=Nagano Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} listed in the “{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}},” and under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} it was classified as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Prefectural Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Enshrined deities === The shrine enshrines the following three deities: * {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi}} * Emperor Hondawake (Hondawake no Sumeramikoto: the 15th {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}) === Overview === The Mae-gu (Front Shrine) is located in Shiojiri Town, Shiojiri City, while the Okusha (Inner Shrine) is located at Myōjindaira in Kakizawa, in the same city. The honden of the Mae-gu is built in the nagare-zukuri style with three bays and a copper roof. Between two one-bay nagare-zukuri shrine buildings, a doorway has been installed for the purpose of distant worship of the Okusha at Myōjindaira, giving the structure a distinctive design. The three shrines are known as Ōmiya Hachimangū, Arei Daimyōjin, and Shiojiri Daimyōjin, and are richly decorated with carvings from the mid-Edo period. During the Sengoku period, the shrine received the patronage of the {{ill|lt=Takeda clan|Q1210114|qid=Q1210114|1=Takeda clan}}, including donations of shrine lands. According to shrine tradition, the shrine was originally located near the Iohata Rock on the eastern foothills of {{ill|lt=Shiojiri Pass|Q10434172|qid=Q10434172|1=Shiojiri Pass}}, and was relocated to Myōjindaira in Kakizawa during the {{ill|lt=Nara period|Q189178|qid=Q189178|1=Nara period}}. With the establishment of {{ill|lt=Shiojiri-juku|Q3482312|qid=Q3482312|1=Shiojiri-shuku}} on the {{ill|lt=Nakasendō|Q1154479|qid=Q1154479|1=Nakasendō}} in the early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, only the Mae-gu was relocated to the western edge of the post town. The current parishioners consist of seven neighborhoods in the eastern district of Shiojiri: Kamimachi, Muromachi, Nakamachi, Miyamoto-machi, Horinouchi, Nagaune, and Sajiki. It is said that the ancient {{ill|lt=Tōsandō|Q1334011|qid=Q1334011|1=Tōsandō}} post station “Kakushi Station” was located near this shrine.{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Dictionary of Japanese Place Names|Q4093011|qid=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 20 Nagano Prefecture, p.306 === Festivals === * Iohata Festival: May 1 * Okusha Festival: June 29 * Grand Annual Festival: July 10–11 === Notes === === References === {{Citation method|section=1|date=2020-11}} * Arei Shrine (ed.), “Engishiki-nai Arei Shrine,” 2000 * Shinshū Local History Research Association (ed.), “Temples and Shrines,” 1981, {{ill|lt=Shinano Mainichi Shimbun|Q11386181|qid=Q11386181|lt=Shinano Mainichi Shimbun Company|1=Shinano Mainichi Shimbun}} * {{ill|lt=Ken’ichi Tanigawa|Q2392596|qid=Q2392596|1=Ken'ichi Tanigawa}} (ed.), “Gods of Japan – Shrines and Sacred Sites – Vol. 9: Mino, Hida, and Shinano,” 2000, {{ill|lt=Hakusuisha|Q4346470|qid=Q4346470|1=Hakusuisha Publishing}} === External links === * [https://tokimeguri.jp/spot/1287.php Arei Shrine / Arei Shrine Grand Festival] Shiojiri City Tourism Association * [https://www7a.biglobe.ne.jp/~areijinja/ Shinshū Shiojiri Arei Shrine Grand Festival] * [http://www.nagano-jinjacho.jp/shibu/02cyusin/03syouenchiku/arei.html Arei Shrine] – Nagano Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=Nagano Prefecture}} {{Shinto navigation}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Arei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Arei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shinano Province]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shinano Province]] [[Category:長野県の旧県社]] [[Category:長野県の神社]] [[Category:塩尻市の歴史]] [[Category:塩尻市の建築物]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:incorrect template category applied]]
